content.en:
Mixed Yuan Sacred Mountain.

Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme came here, he had been here once, and now he came again.

For the first time, the owner of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, the Mixed Yuan Supreme, appeared.

Of course, it was just one of his doppelgangers that appeared.

"Kunwu Supreme, Ye Tian, welcome to the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme laughed.

Kunwu Supreme said directly: "Mixed Yuan Supreme, Ye Tian wants to enter the Mixed Yuan Tower to test his combat power!"

"Oh, test the combat power, yes, I also want to know what level of combat power Ye Tian can reach now that he has stepped into the ultimate level of domination?"

"Thank you Mixed Yuan Supreme!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the Mixed Yuan Tower!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme Dao.

The three of them moved to the Mixed Yuan Tower, and Ye Tian immediately entered the Mixed Yuan Tower.

The Mixed Yuan Tower is usually not opened, because it takes energy to open the Mixed Yuan Tower, and now that Ye Tian has entered the Mixed Yuan Tower, the movement of the Mixed Yuan Tower opening has attracted the attention of many people in the Mixed Yuan Mountain.

In particular, the appearance of the two supremes of the Mixed Yuan Supreme and the Kunwu Supreme in front of the Mixed Yuan Pagoda immediately caused the shock of many people in the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

Whew!!

One by one, the cosmic gods, the masters, and the celestial deities of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain appeared in front of the Mixed Yuan Pagoda.

"The disciple has seen the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and he has seen the Kunwu Supreme!"

"The disciple has seen the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and he has seen the Kunwu Supreme!"

"The disciple has seen the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and he has seen the Kunwu Supreme!"

Suddenly.

A huge figure appeared, and the others shouted, "I've seen the mountain lord!"

The Mountain Lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain appeared, and he was also the son of the Mixed Yuan Supreme.

"Father, the Mixed Yuan Tower is open?"

The Mountain Lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain asked curiously.

"Yes, Ye Tian, the master of ten thousand laws, has come here to test his combat power!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme Dao.

"Ye Tian, I see!"

The mountain lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is clear.

"Father, Grandpa!"

A beautiful figure suddenly appeared, jumping in the void.

"Xin'er girl, you're here!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme looked at the woman with doting eyes and said.

This woman is Li Xin'er, the young master of the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain, the young master who once entered the small world of chaos with Ye Tian.

At the beginning, she was only a great god, but now she is already in the realm of cosmic gods.

"Grandpa, father, I heard that the Mixed Yuan Pagoda was opened? Hmph, I said before that I wanted to enter the Mixed Yuan Pagoda to break through, but you were not happy, how did you open it this time?"

Li Xin'er said angrily.

"Ten Thousand Laws Master Ye Tian is here, test his combat power. As for you, you are only in the realm of the Universe God, what are you doing when you enter the Mixed Yuan Tower, you can't even get past the first layer, and it is a waste of resources to open the Mixed Yuan Tower for you!"

"Ah, Ye Tian is here, he's in the realm of domination, so fast!"

Li Xin'er was surprised.

"Hmm!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme nodded.

"Grandpa, how many layers do you think Ye Tian can break through?"

Li Xin'er asked curiously.

"It's hard to say!" "Mixed Yuan Supreme said with a smile: "Breaking through the first layer is equivalent to having the combat power of the fifth-rank Heavenly Venerable, breaking through the fifth layer is equivalent to having the first-class Tianzun combat power, once you break through the sixth layer, it is equivalent to having the fifth-rank supreme-level combat power." Ye Tian's talent is extremely rare, and his combat power is naturally not comparable to that of ordinary geniuses, but I don't know much about what level his strength can reach. Kunwu Supreme, you are most familiar with Ye Tian, what level do you think Ye Tian's combat power can reach?"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme didn't want to comment indiscriminately, so he threw this topic directly to the Kunwu Supreme on the side, if the Kunwu Supreme said something wrong, it would have nothing to do with him.

Kunwu Supreme glanced at the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and knowing the plan of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, he smiled slightly, and didn't care.

He opened his mouth and said, "I think Ye Tian should be able to break through the fifth layer, that is, the first-class Tianzun combat power!"

"Kunwu Supreme, your evaluation is too high!" Mixed Yuan Supreme was surprised, "Every level of Tianzun is very difficult to cross, it hasn't been long since Ye Tiancai became the master, do you think he is expected to step into the first-class Tianzun combat power?"

"Mixed Yuan Supreme, this is my lowest estimate, maybe ......"

Kunwu Supreme didn't continue, he was afraid that if he said that guess, everyone present would be dumbfounded!

Inside the Mixed Element Tower.

Ye Tian was fighting with the five illusioned warriors on the first layer, these five warriors each had various special talent warriors, and they complemented each other, and there were no loopholes.

Therefore, it is not realistic to rely on loopholes to defeat them, and only by relying on real strength can they be defeated, which is also the reason why they can accurately test their combat power.

Ye Tianxian fought with them for a few minutes, took a look at their fighting methods, and after understanding them, he didn't waste any more time, killed them with one blow, and broke through the first layer.

Then, Ye Tian came to the second layer, where he also met five warriors.

The five warriors of the second layer were naturally very powerful, all of them were second only to the fourth-rank Tianzun combat power, and if they were combined, only the fourth-order Tianzun combat power could be expected to defeat them.

Ye Tian wasted no time, he easily defeated them and entered the third layer.

Outside.

Someone was surprised: "The Lord of Ten Thousand Laws has broken into the third layer, and now he is at least a fourth-rank Heavenly Venerable!"

"Has Ye Tian become so powerful?"

Li Xin'er was really hit.

Her strength has also improved very quickly, and she has the resources provided by the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, plus the Mixed Yuan Supreme who is often the first supreme of the human race as a tutor, but the gap between her and Ye Tian is getting bigger and bigger.

"It's the fourth layer, Ye Tian has entered the fourth layer!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme's expression moved.

Breaking into the fourth layer so quickly proves that Ye Tian's strength definitely doesn't stop at the fourth layer!

"Could it be that Ye Tian really has a combat power comparable to that of a first-class Heavenly Venerable?"

Kunwu Supreme thought so.

Time passed slowly, and suddenly the fifth layer of the Mixed Yuan Tower emitted light, which proved that Ye Tian had broken into the fifth layer.

"The fifth layer, once you break through, it will be a first-class Tianzun combat power, even if we are in the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, for a long time, there are only a handful of strong people with a first-class Tianzun combat power or above!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme sighed.

Ye Tian's growth speed is too fast, even he was far inferior to Ye Tian at the beginning!

After a while, the light of the fifth layer dimmed, and the light of the sixth layer lit up.

At this moment, the Kunwu Supreme smiled, the Mixed Yuan Supreme stared wide, and many powerhouses in the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain were dumbfounded.

"Ye Tian, you really have a first-class Heavenly Venerable combat power!!

Li Xin'er covered her mouth and froze.

In everyone's opinion, Ye Tian should be defeated soon, after all, if he wants to break through the sixth layer, he must have the combat power of a fifth-rank supreme!

Is it possible that the Juggernaut has supreme combat power?

Impossible!

At this time, the sixth floor of the Mixed Yuan Tower.

Ye Tian fell into a bitter battle!
